cross_platform_context.key_insights: Latest stable shared context was still Claude's v1.8.0 UI baseline on main plus prior migration planning. This session branched into admin workflow hardening: bearer propagation was inconsistent, several sidebar routes were dead, LINE settings entry was orphaned, and AGENT auth semantics did not match live-chat access. Commit 2f06695 on feat/ui-workflow-audit addresses those issues.
